title: MULTIPLY Formula issue HELP ME PLEASE!
excerpt: Good Afternoon. Im trying to set a formula that will calculate mileage automatically. So for example if the drove 15 miles and our reimbursement is 0.585 the formula would spit out 8.775. But the formula im trying many d…

posts.author: Morgan (Morgan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good Afternoon. Im trying to set a formula that will calculate mileage automatically. So for example if the drove 15 miles and our reimbursement is 0.585 the formula would spit out 8.775. But the formula im trying many different ways is broken. PLEASE ADVISE. Thanks so much in advance. This is the formula I am using.
MULTIPLY({Mile amount}0.585)

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Morgan ,

Welcome to community.
Try this

{Mile amount} * 0.585

posts.author: Morgan (Morgan)
posts.cookedHtml:
kolaai:

{Mile account} * 0.585

YOU ROCK! Thanks so much … you made that look easy HAHAHAHA! Have a great day!
